skill.stones_irons_bridge.school_of_bloo: Draw upon the crimson life force that binds all mortals. Unlocks the esoteric arts of Blood Magic.
enchantment.stones_irons_bridge.blood: Sacrificial Rite: This ancient rune allows you to cast %2$s. Circle spells from the School of Blood, turning your own vitality into a devastating weapon.
skill.stones_irons_bridge.school_of_eldr: Gaze into the abyss and comprehend the incomprehensible. Unlocks the maddening arts of Eldritch Magic.
enchantment.stones_irons_bridge.eldritch: Whispers of the Deep: This otherworldly rune allows you to cast %2$s. Circle spells from the School of Eldritch, twisting reality to your will.
skill.stones_irons_bridge.school_of_ende: Bend space and reality like the denizens of the End. Unlocks the teleporting arts of Ender Magic.
enchantment.stones_irons_bridge.ender: Void Walker's Mark: This dimensional rune allows you to cast %2$s. Circle spells from the School of Ender, letting you slip through the fabric of the world.
skill.stones_irons_bridge.school_of_evoc: Summon spectral entities and command the very forces used by the Illagers. Unlocks the conjuring arts of Evocation.
enchantment.stones_irons_bridge.evocatio: Illusionist's Grasp: This sinister rune allows you to cast %2$s. Circle spells from the School of Evocation, bringing your darkest thoughts to life.
skill.stones_irons_bridge.school_of_fire: Ignite your spirit with the primal essence of destruction. Unlocks the blazing arts of Fire Magic.
enchantment.stones_irons_bridge.fire: Inferno's Embrace: This searing rune allows you to cast %2$s. Circle spells from the School of Fire, reducing your foes to nothing but ashes.
skill.stones_irons_bridge.school_of_holy: Channel the divine light to mend the wounded and smite the wicked. Unlocks the radiant arts of Holy Magic.
enchantment.stones_irons_bridge.holy: Divine Blessing: This glowing rune allows you to cast %2$s. Circle spells from the School of Holy, making you a beacon of light in the darkest of times.
Embrace the biting chill of the frozen wastes and command the frost. Unlocks the freezing arts of Ice Magic.
enchantment.stones_irons_bridge.ice: Glacial Heart: This freezing rune allows you to cast %2$s. Circle spells from the School of Ice, stopping your enemies dead in their tracks.
skill.stones_irons_bridge.school_of_ligh: Harness the volatile energy of the roaring storms. Unlocks the electrifying arts of Lightning Magic.
enchantment.stones_irons_bridge.lightnin: Stormcaller's Vow: This crackling rune allows you to cast %2$s. Circle spells from the School of Lightning, bringing the wrath of the heavens down upon the earth.
skill.stones_irons_bridge.school_of_natu: Become one with the roots, the earth, and the venom of the wild. Unlocks the blooming arts of Nature Magic.
enchantment.stones_irons_bridge.nature: Druid's Awakening: This earthen rune allows you to cast %2$s. Circle spells from the School of Nature, calling upon the untamed wilds to fight by your side.
skill.stones_irons_bridge.school_of_void: Tap into the vast, consuming emptiness that lies between worlds. Unlocks the destructive arts of Void Magic.
enchantment.stones_irons_bridge.void: Embrace the Nothingness: This dark rune allows you to cast %2$s. Circle spells from the School of Void, unmaking creation itself.
milestone.stones_irons_bridge.battle_mag: Every melee hit builds kinetic energy. Upon reaching capacity, you gain Arcane Overdrive. At the highest levels, you even retain combo points after discharging!
milestone.stones_irons_bridge.arcane_foc: Your magic echoes in the arcane currents. Every spell cast has a chance to trigger Clearcast, making your next spell cost no reagents. Your Luck attribute further increases this chance!
rune.stones_irons_bridge.major_mana_rege: Grants a significantly noticeable mana regeneration.
rune.stones_irons_bridge.minor_spell_pow: Grants a slight bonus to all spell damage.
rune.stones_irons_bridge.major_spell_pow: Enormously amplifies your magical destructive power.
rune.stones_irons_bridge.minor_spell_res: Provides light protection against enemy magic.
rune.stones_irons_bridge.major_spell_res: Makes you extremely resilient against magical attacks.
rune.stones_irons_bridge.minor_cooldown_: Slightly reduces the cooldown of spells.
rune.stones_irons_bridge.major_cooldown_: Allows you to cast spells much faster in succession.

rune.stones_irons_bridge.major_eldritch_: Major Rune of Eldritch Magic Power

runes.stones_irons_bridge.major_blood.de: A major rune that dynamically enhances your Blood magic knowledge as you grow stronger.
runes.stones_irons_bridge.minor_blood.de: A minor rune providing a solid, static increase to your Blood magic knowledge.
runes.stones_irons_bridge.major_eldritch: A major rune that dynamically enhances your Eldritch magic knowledge as you grow stronger.
runes.stones_irons_bridge.minor_eldritch: A minor rune providing a solid, static increase to your Eldritch magic knowledge.
gui.stones_irons_bridge.prompt.title: Interface Setup
gui.stones_irons_bridge.prompt.question: Which spell menu would you like to use?
gui.stones_irons_bridge.prompt.info: Your choice prevents keybind conflicts in-game.
gui.stones_irons_bridge.reagent.title: Server Setup: Reagents
gui.stones_irons_bridge.reagent.question: Do you want to play with reagent consumption on this server?
gui.stones_irons_bridge.reagent.info:
Please note: Some skills are only relevant when using reagents.

The reagents for each spell can be adjusted via:
data/stones_irons_bridge/spell_reagents.json
or config/stones_irons_bridge/reagent_list.json
runes.stones_irons_bridge.major_ender.de: A major rune that dynamically enhances your Ender magic knowledge as you grow stronger.
runes.stones_irons_bridge.minor_ender.de: A minor rune providing a solid, static increase to your Ender magic knowledge.

milestone.stones_irons_bridge.archon.des: Breaks the laws of time! Sacrifice all your mana upon activation to temporarily remove the cooldowns of your spells. Reaching rune level 10 triggers an Awakening: You will additionally need no reagents to cast while this effect is active!
